rationale: Plan v10 is fully implementation-ready and comprehensively aligns with the governing v2.7 specification. The plan integrates all required constraints with exact precision, including D31 (independent, driver-counted contract-files consumption by the ledger weaver) and D32 (the strictly frozen loader-capable built-in safe-exports mapping). The fail-closed trust model is rigidly upheld throughout the design, particularly via the outbound specifier allowlist, atomic no-replace publication (D20/D28), and the uncompromising driver-owned accounting mechanism that rejects any incomplete consumption (D26/D29). The test plan, closure verifications, and git provenance guardrails are robust.
